name: Meat-Filled Rye Bun
description: Fish-stuffed bread. The fish has its head and bones removed before being wrapped in bacon, encased in rye dough, and baked. The thickness of the bread is key to keeping the fish juicy.

suspicious.name: Suspicious Meat-Filled Rye Bun
suspicious.description: Fish-stuffed bread. The bread is hard enough to pass for a shoe sole, while stubborn fish scales cling to your teeth and resist every attempt to scrape them off... One bite in, and you will already be looking for water to rinse your mouth.

normal.name: Meat-Filled Rye Bun
normal.description: Fish-stuffed bread. The fish has its head and bones removed before being wrapped in bacon, encased in rye dough, and baked. The thickness of the bread is key to keeping the fish juicy.

delicious.name: Delicious Meat-Filled Rye Bun
delicious.description: Fish-stuffed bread. Crack open its crisp, charred crust, and rich, savory oils come rushing out, followed by the clean sweetness of the fish. In the end, every flavor settles into the hearty crust, now steeped in fragrant juices. A single bite is enough to make even the bitter wind draw back.
